sections.biography-source-undefined: Dong Cheng was likely either a nephew to Empress Dowager Dong or a relative to Dong Zhuo. Pei Songzhi believes the former is likely but a quote by Huangfu Li implies Dong Cheng is related to Dong Zhuo by placing him in the ilk of Dong Min and Dong Huang, who are known to be related to Dong Zhuo. The quote in specific is, “But within, he [Dong Zhuo] believed Lord Wang [Yun] was an interior master, and outside, he believed Dong Min, [Dong] Cheng, and [Dong] Huang to be poison.”

full_text:
Dong Cheng 董承
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Cheng (董承)was born in Hejian or Longxi. General of Cavalry and Chariots. Plotted to assassinate Cao Cao. Dong Cheng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Dong Zhuo, Li Jue, and the Wei Kingdom. Dong Cheng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographySource Undefined
Dong Cheng was likely either a nephew to Empress Dowager Dong or a relative to Dong Zhuo. Pei Songzhi believes the former is likely but a quote by Huangfu Li implies Dong Cheng is related to Dong Zhuo by placing him in the ilk of Dong Min and Dong Huang, who are known to be related to Dong Zhuo. The quote in specific is, “But within, he [Dong Zhuo] believed Lord Wang [Yun] was an interior master, and outside, he believed Dong Min, [Dong] Cheng, and [Dong] Huang to be poison.”
